violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the bakery area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
The handwashing sink was in poor repair, observed leak from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
Ceiling in basement was observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
The floor junctures in the ware washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024
